# AgentAnycast Python SDK

> Python SDK for AgentAnycast — the decentralized P2P runtime for the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol. Build P2P agents with `async/await`, framework adapters, and MCP bridging.

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): Install and run your first P2P agent in 5 minutes
- [Python SDK Reference](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/python-sdk.md): Complete API docs — Node, AgentCard, Task, IncomingTask
- [Examples](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/examples.md): CrewAI, LangGraph, MCP tool mapping, streaming
- [Architecture](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): Sidecar daemon + SDK design
- [Protocol Reference](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/protocol.md): Wire format, task lifecycle, 16 gRPC RPCs

## Quick Install

```bash
pip install agentanycast

# With framework adapters
pip install agentanycast[crewai]
pip install agentanycast[langgraph]
pip install agentanycast[adapters]  # all adapters

# Development
pip install -e ".[dev]"
```

## Key APIs

### Node — main entry point

```python
from agentanycast import Node, AgentCard, Skill

card = AgentCard(name="MyAgent", skills=[Skill(id="echo", description="Echo service")])
async with Node(card=card) as node:
    @node.on_task
    async def handle(task):
        user_msg = task.messages[-1].parts[0].text
        await task.complete(artifacts=[{"parts": [{"text": f"Echo: {user_msg}"}]}])
    await node.serve_forever()
```

### Three addressing modes for send_task

```python
# Direct — known peer
result = await node.send_task(peer_id="12D3KooW...", message="Hello")

# Anycast — skill-based routing
result = await node.send_task(skill="translate", message="Hello")

# HTTP Bridge — standard A2A endpoint
result = await node.send_task(url="https://agent.example.com", message="Hello")
```

### Framework adapters

```python
# CrewAI
from agentanycast.adapters.crewai import serve_crew
await serve_crew(crew, card=card)

# LangGraph
from agentanycast.adapters.langgraph import serve_graph
await serve_graph(graph, card=card)
```

### MCP bridging

```python
from agentanycast.mcp import mcp_tool_to_skill, skill_to_mcp_tool
skill = mcp_tool_to_skill(mcp_tool)
tool = skill_to_mcp_tool(skill)
```

### DID identity

```python
from agentanycast.did import peer_id_to_did_key, did_key_to_peer_id
did = peer_id_to_did_key("12D3KooW...")
peer_id = did_key_to_peer_id("did:key:z6Mk...")
```

### CLI

```bash
agentanycast demo              # Start echo agent
agentanycast discover <skill>  # Find agents by skill
agentanycast send <target> "msg"  # Send task to peer/skill/URL
agentanycast status            # Daemon status
agentanycast info              # Node info (PeerID, DID, addresses)
```

## Key Concepts

- **Sidecar daemon**: Go binary auto-downloaded on first run; SDK communicates via gRPC over Unix socket
- **AgentCard**: Declares agent identity, skills, and capabilities (A2A standard)
- **IncomingTask**: Server-side task handle with `complete()`, `fail()`, `update()`, `send_artifact()`
- **TaskHandle**: Client-side handle returned by `send_task()` with status and result access
- **Streaming**: Chunked artifact delivery for large payloads via `send_artifact()`
- **Offline queue**: Messages queued when peer is offline, delivered on reconnection

## Related Repositories

- [agentanycast](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast): Documentation hub
- [agentanycast-ts](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-ts): TypeScript SDK
- [agentanycast-node](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-node): Go daemon
- [agentanycast-relay](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-relay): Relay server
- [agentanycast-proto](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-proto): Protobuf definitions
